title: verbascum × pseudothapsus
intro: Verbascum × pseudothapsus is a rare, sterile hybrid plant resulting from a cross between the Verbascum phoeniceum (Mullein) and Verbascum thapsus (Great Mullein). This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Verbascum × pseudothapsus include its ability to soothe sore throats, reduce fever, and act as an antiseptic to treat wounds and skin irritations. In herbal preparations, Verbascum × pseudothapsus is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
